audit_items.proof_trace: Function allocates flist (strdup), db (calloc), db->buf (calloc), db->fname (strdup). Error paths return -1 without freeing flist, db, db->buf, or db->fname. Loop may link db nodes into ctx->proxy_code list; subsequent iteration failure leaks entire list.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers memory exhaustion or malformed proxy_startfile config causing allocation failure, resulting in permanent memory leak across config reloads.
